ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the passenger survived (1) or not (0) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "sex_female" INTEGER /* Indicator for female gender (1 if female, 0 otherwise) */,
  "sex_male" INTEGER /* Indicator for male gender (1 if male, 0 otherwise) */,
  "embarked_c" INTEGER /* Indicator for embarkation at Cherbourg (1 if embarked at C, 0 otherwise) */,
  "embarked_q" INTEGER /* Indicator for embarkation at Queenstown (1 if embarked at Q, 0 otherwise) */,
  "embarked_s" INTEGER /* Indicator for embarkation at Southampton (1 if embarked at S, 0 otherwise) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number assigned to the passenger */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger (if available) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger (e.g., Single, Married, Divorced) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the passenger (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Miss, Dr.) */,
  "relatives_onboard" TEXT /* List of relatives' names who were also on board */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for travel (e.g., Business, Pleasure, Relocation) */,
  "survivor_location" TEXT /* Location where the survivor was rescued or where the body was recovered */,
  "body_recovered" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the body was recovered (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked_s FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_s") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked_q FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_q") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex_female FOREIGN KEY ("sex_female") REFERENCES gender ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex_male FOREIGN KEY ("sex_male") REFERENCES gender ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked_c FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_c") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the port (e.g., C, Q, S) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger being analyzed */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate for the passenger's demographic group */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare paid by the passenger's demographic group */,
  "average_sibsp" REAL /* Average number of siblings/spouses for the passenger's demographic group */,
  "average_parch" REAL /* Average number of parents/children for the passenger's demographic group */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the passenger's demographic group */,
  "average_occupation" TEXT /* Most common occupation in the passenger's demographic group */,
  "average_nationality" TEXT /* Most common nationality in the passenger's demographic group */,
  "average_marital_status" TEXT /* Most common marital status in the passenger's demographic group */,
  "average_travel_reason" TEXT /* Most common travel reason in the passenger's demographic group */,
  "survival_rate_by_age" REAL /* Survival rate of the passenger's demographic group by age */,
  "survival_rate_by_occupation" REAL /* Survival rate of the passenger's demographic group by occupation */,
  "survival_rate_by_nationality" REAL /* Survival rate of the passenger's demographic group by nationality */,
  "survival_rate_by_marital_status" REAL /* Survival rate of the passenger's demographic group by marital status */,
  "survival_rate_by_travel_reason" REAL /* Survival rate of the passenger's demographic group by travel reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_analysis_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
